explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while fats are the biggest drag. It lands in C tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in C tier with an overall score of 18 from a base nutrition score of 18. Context barely changed the result.

topPros.title: efficient energy source
topPros.explanation: That can be a strength in the right context.

topPros.title: helps meals actually work
topPros.explanation: A fat that people can use well matters more than a theoretical one.

topCons.title: extremely calorie dense by default
topCons.explanation: That is the unavoidable category burden.

topCons.title: not a complete food on its own
topCons.explanation: Even the better fats are still just part of a meal.

closing.summary: Beef Tallow does have a few real-world upsides. but the nutrition case is still weak and the downsides drag it down hard. best only in small amounts when the cooking job matters more than the nutrition case.
closing.useCaseNote: Best only in small amounts when the cooking job matters more than the nutrition case.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?

reviewChecklist: Verify nutrient values are sourced well enough for publishable use.
Review narration for category repetition and trim any awkward lines.
Confirm subtitle density stays readable at phone speed.
Replace placeholder hero/sprite art with final asset selection.
Check that the final tier verdict feels editorially defensible.
nextHumanStep: Review the generated narration + manifest, then use the manifest as the handoff into visual assembly / editing.
